type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changes due to improved waste management practices with waste incineration and changes to basis of estimate by using updated stack test results from 2017 that are based on emission results at time of sampling. In addition, the reporting unit was corrected to g/yr. In previous year the TEQ value was reported in the g/yr column.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in emissions due to the site coming out of care and maintenance and undergoing significant construction in order to put the mine/mill complex into production. As a result of the 2016 stack testing, TMAC has undertaken an assessment of operating procedures and waste stream segregation to identify improvements which may reduce dioxin and furan emissions.

reasonsForPlan.en: Plan was prepared or implemented for another government jurisdiction or Parliament (i.e. provincial government)
reasonsForPlan.fr: Plan préparé ou mis en œuvre pour une autre autorité gouvernementale (c.-à-d., autre ministère fédéral, province, municipalité)

reasonsForPlan.en: Plan was prepared or implemented on a voluntary basis
reasonsForPlan.fr: Plan préparé ou mis en œuvre volontairement

p2Plan.planComment: Pollution prevention plan(s) were developed in accordance to Nunavut Impact Review Boards project specific guidelines, Nunavut Water Board requirements, and Agnico internal policies and agreements.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time
reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Des activités ont été mises en oeuvre lors d'une année précédente; des activités supplémentaires sont soit inutiles ou irréalisables actuellement
